patches.title: Phasmophobia - Hotfix v0.17.1.2
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters.Today we have released an additional hotfix for Phasmophobia that is available now for all platforms.Patch notes:FixesFixed an issue that was causing a crash across all platforms.

patches.title: Phasmophobia - Hotfix v0.17.1.1
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters.Today we have released a small hotfix for Phasmophobia, addressing feedback from the community following our latest update.Patch notes can be found below. FixesFixed an issue that caused held equipment/items to visually stutter when moving.Fixed several issues that lead to game crashes.Fixed an issue that caused the Kormos to detect dead players and attempt to kill them.Fixed an issue where the Kormos could detect sound from dead players.Fixed an issue where the Coffee World tent names were incorrect.Other fixes and improvements. Known IssuesPlayers can become locked when interacting with the Truck's CCTV screen while using a Spirit Box.

patches.title: Phasmophobia by Alan Wake - v0.17.1.0
patches.content: Welcome bacK Ghost Hunters, a new story has been written.Today we are excited tO release Phasmophobia by Alan Wake, our fiRst in-gaMe collaboratiOn event, created in partnerShip with Remedy Games.With the update now rolling out Across all platformS, we're excited for you to experience What's in store.Below, you'll find our lAuNch trailer alonG with the patch notes. NewPhasmophobia by Alan Wake: A writer, a story, a mystery. Uncover the secrets of the Dark Place in our one-time in-game event that brings the world of Alan Wake 2 to Phasmophobia. Unlock player cosmetics, solve the riddles of the Dark Place and much more.Added a 5 second delay after you die to allow you to select a ghost in the Journal. (Singleplayer only)ChangesSalt will now get instantly placed at the start of the animation instead of the end.Most equipment hold poses have been changed to fix several visual issues including wrists, elbows, arms and the equipment's position on the screen.The T3 Sanity Medication animation will no longer play in Multiplayer.The Tier 1 Igniter is now open so you can see how many matches are left.Removed the inventory swapping animation to allow for instant swapping of held equipment.Prestige cosmetics are now free after they are unlocked based on your Prestige level.FixesCharacter Model FixesFixed an issue that caused the heads of character models to look incorrect when the player looks up and down.Fixed an issue that caused problems with the character rig upon being revived while crouched.Fixed an issue that caused character models to fall down incorrectly upon death.Fixed an issue that caused Non-VR player character’s feet to clip below the ground when standing still.The player characters feet will no longer float in some areas.Fixed the characters walking animation when below 50% player speed.Fixed an issue that caused character model mouths to be open when the player moves to the right.Ghost FixesFixed an issue that prevented the Yurei from fully closing doors.Fixed an issue that caused the Raiju to flicker lights outside of Hunts.Fixed an issue on 42 Edgefield Road that caused the Ghost to get stuck in multiple rooms and not be able to reach players in the garag...

patches.title: Phasmophobia v0.17.1.0 - Patch Notes
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters. We want to start today by apologising for our Player Character Update that launched last week. It’s clear we missed the mark on this, and didn’t deliver on our promises to you. Your feedback and your reviews were justified. Our team has grown significantly over the last year, and with that comes a higher standard that, in this case, we failed to meet. Tomorrow, May 12th, our next update for Phasmophobia will bring with it many fixes, iterations and changes to the game that bring things in-line with our vision for this update. While we know improvements can still be made, we believe this will provide a much better experience for everyone playing Phasmophobia. Over the past week, we’ve read feedback from across the entire community. The frustration and disappointment has been clear. Below is a look at the patch notes, with changes and fixes built on that feedback, that will go live with tomorrow’s update. NewAdded a 5 second delay after you die to allow you to select a ghost in the journal Changes Salt will now get instantly placed at the start of the animation instead of the end.Most equipment hold poses have been changed to fix several visual issues including wrists, elbows, arms and the equipment's position on the screen.The T3 Sanity Medication animation will no longer play in MultiplayerThe Tier 1 Igniter is now open so you can see how many matches are leftRemoved the inventory swapping animation to allow for instant swapping of held equipmentPrestige cosmetics are now free after they are unlocked based on your prestige level Fixes Character Model FixesFixed an issue that caused the heads of character models to look incorrect when the player looks up and down.Fixed an issue that caused problems with the character rig upon being revived while crouched.Fixed an issue that caused character models to fall down incorrectly upon death.Fixed an issue that caused Non-VR player character’s feet to clip below the ground when standing still.The player characters feet will no longer float in some areasFixed the characters walking animation when below 50% player speedFixed an issue that caused character model mouths to be open when the player ...

patches.title: Phasmophobia - Player Character Update 0.17.0.0
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters. Today we’ve released the Player Character Update for Phasmophobia. The update is out now on all platforms where Phasmophobia is available.Patch notes are available below.NewCharacters: 12 new, higher quality character models (6 male, 6 female) with character bios, adjustable hair colour and more.Cosmetics: A wide array of available cosmetic items to equip your chosen character with; coats, shirts and trousers, all with multiple colour options. Unique shirts for prestige and event specific achievements. Accessories such as piercings, hats and glasses are also available. Note: All cosmetics are either unlockable in-game or purchased with in-game currency. Animations: Alongside the new character models, interactions with equipment, objects and the environment will now feature character animations. Upon dying, a new death animation will also be seen.PC VR Players can enable/disable new first-person death animations with the ‘immersive animations’ toggle in the options menu, as seen below. If disabled, which is the default, the new death animation will be seen in third-person.Player Watch: A watch has been added to the character models that can be used during contracts to monitor player sanity levels and keep track of time elapsed during the contract. To view the watch in full, players can hold the Use button when their left hand is empty or by opening their Journal. The watch will not display Sanity if the Sanity Monitor is disabled, nor will it count as a piece of electronic equipment for Ghost abilities.For VR Players, the watch will always be visible and can be viewed by simply raising their left hand up.Cursed Hollow Cosmetics: The Cursed Hollow cosmetic rewards are now available for all players. The Cursed Hollow Mask, T-Shirt and Necklace can be equipped from within the customisation Shop.ChangesID Cards: ID Cards and Badges are now equipped and swapped within the customisation Shop menu, rather than the main menu.Death Room: The room a player will enter after being killed by the Ghost has been removed, with the player now seamlessly transitioning to the Dead state. Player’s Journal: The Journal will now appear in game when being u...

patches.title: Player Character Update, coming May 5th, 2026.
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters. We have some much-anticipated news for you.Today we’re excited to announce that Phasmophobia’s Player Character Update will be launching across all platforms on May 5th, 2026. Stay tuned to our social channels and official Discord server for exact release timings. While we won’t go into too many details before the release, we did want to lift the curtain ever so slightly on some of what you can expect to see in the update. A full rundown of changes, additions and more will be available when the update is released.Of course, at the heart of this update is the ability to customise your player character in-game. After a long wait, the Customisation shop in the lobby is finally open for business. Here you’ll be able to choose from one of 12 characters and be able to change their clothing, hair colour and much more. While the shop is full of options at launch, you can look forward to more items being added in future updates and Twitch Drops - such as the below High Priestess T-shirt drop that'll be starting with the launch of the update.This Twitch Drop will be available for all Phasmophobia creators to distribute to their communities from May 5th until May 11th.To earn Twitch Drops, make sure you've connected your Twitch account to Phasmophobia.Customisation plays a huge role in this update, but it’s not the only change. With the Player Character Update, we’ll be introducing new character animations as well as some changes to the overall gameplay experience such as the removal of the death room and the way you interact with both the environment and your chosen equipment during an investigation.Check out a few screenshots below to get a taste of what’s to come on May 5th. There is plenty to explore and experience once the update launches and we can’t wait to hear your thoughts on the changes to the game. Of course, this is a huge update to the game we’ve all known and loved for many years so we’ll be looking out for feedback after release so that we can continue to iterate and improve Phasmophobia as we head towards 1.0 later this year.

patches.title: Phasmophobia by Alan Wake, coming May 12th 2026
patches.content: Ghost Hunters, The Dark Place envelops Phasmophobia when Phasmophobia by Alan Wake, a limited time in-game event created in partnership with Remedy Games, comes to the game on May 12th, 2026.We're so excited to be collaborating directly with Remedy on this one time event, and can't wait for you to experience what's in store. We'll share more details on the event closer to launch, but until then, stay in the light.

patches.title: Don't Miss! Galaxies Showcase Exclusive Twitch Drop
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters. Today we're excited to detail our partnership with the imminent Galaxies Showcase taking place on April 16th, 2026 at 8PM GMT.You'll be able to tune in to the showcase via Galaxies' official website.During the showcase, Phasmophobia players will be able to earn the above Astronomer ID Card & Badge as a special event Twitch Drop for watching a total of 30 minutes of the show itself. To make sure your account is eligible to earn Twitch Drops, please make sure you've connected your account to your game. Creators that are co-streaming the event and have Drops enabled on their channel will also be eligible to distribute the Twitch Drop reward to their community. Galaxies are offering Twitch creators the opportunity to co-stream by filling out the form on their website.We're so excited to be a part of Galaxies once again following our participation in the first-ever Galaxies show in 2025. Enjoy the show!

patches.title: Phasmophobia - Cursed Hollow v0.16.1.2
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters. We've got an update for you.Today we've released a minor update for Phasmophobia that addresses several issues following on from our Cursed Hollow update earlier this month. The patch notes can be found below.Thank you to everyone who provided information on these issues.FixesFixed several issues on the below maps that caused issues with ghost traversal and bone spawn locations: Camp Woodwind Maple Lodge Campsite Brownstone Highschool Grafton Farmhouse Sunny Meadows 10 Ridgeview Court 13 Willow Street

patches.title: Phasmophobia X YouTooz
patches.content: Ghost Hunters,We're excited to reveal our collaboration with YouTooz - a vinyl figure of the Forest Spirit from the Cursed Hollow event, currently taking place in Phasmophobia until April 21st. The Forest Spirit vinyl figure is available to purchase now for a limited time only, you have until May 5th at 12PM PT.Order yours here: https://youtooz.com/products/forest-spirit

patches.title: Phasmophobia X Galaxies Showcase
patches.content: Ghost Hunters, time to tune in.Phasmophobia will be a part of the Galaxies Spring Showcase on Twitch taking place 16th April, 2026 at 8PM BST. Watch the show to also earn the exclusive Astronomer ID Card & Badge Twitch Drop.

patches.title: Phasmophobia - Cursed Hollow v0.16.1.0
patches.content: Welcome back, Ghost Hunters. We’ve got an update for you. Today we’re excited to kick-off 2026’s iteration of Cursed Hollow, Phasmophobia’s annual springtime in-game event. As detailed previously, we’re tasking Ghost Hunters to once again work together to unlock rewards by taking part in event activities on the event specific maps. Full details can be found via the linked blog above and below you’ll find today’s patch notes.NewCursed Hollow: Complete contracts, objectionable objectives and more to earn points towards both Community & Personal goals. Each day, a different selection of locations will be specified on the contract board to be a part of the event. For more details, read here.Double XP & Rewards: For the first week of the event (31st March - 7th April), players will receive double XP and rewards from their contracts. Cursed Hollow Rewards: On completing the goals, players will be rewarded with event-specific rewards such as the Pathfinder ID Card & Badge, in both static and animated versions. As part of the Cursed Hollow rewards, players will notice that we are offering cosmetic rewards for the first time. Going forward, this will be the case for every seasonal event.For this year’s Cursed Hollow only, while the challenge can be completed during the event, the rewards themselves will only be available at the launch of our Player Character Update, due for release soon. Players that successfully complete the Cursed Hollow Cosmetics personal goal will be able to view and equip these items as soon as the update is available. To that end, we wanted to provide a preview of the rewards themselves so Ghost Hunters know what they are working towards. ChangesWhen revealing a ‘lucky’ Forest Minion, the ghost speed will decrease by 10%. This is stackable.When revealing an ‘unlucky’ Forest Minion, the ghost speed will increase by 10%. This is stackable.Fixes The Cursed Hollow Altar in the warehouse will now transform correctly upon certain goals being achieved by the community and player.Fixed an issue on 6 Tanglewood Drive that caused rain during Blood Moon weather to not have any audio.Fixed an issue that caused fingerprints on 6 Tanglewood Drive to display at t...
